final:
module sram_cell (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input write_enable,
    input read_enable,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      memory <= ~data_in;
      if (write_enable) begin
        data_out <= ~memory;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
